reason: Structural limitation: C++ code in Electron cannot be compiled/tested in isolation (requires full build system). All behavioral tests necessarily use regex/text inspection. Gold image has uncommitted changes which fail git_repository_valid and git_no_uncommitted_changes P2P tests. F2P tests pass (8 passed, 1 failed due to trailing whitespace in .cc file from sed edit). This is a pre-existing style issue not related to the test rewrite itself.
